src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Remove the insecure global SSL verification disabling logic and its associated imports.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Removed `disableSslVerification()` method and `javax.net.ssl` imports.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Add a utility method to mask sensitive OAuth tokens in debug logs to prevent credential leakage.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: private static String maskToken(String token) { ... return token.substring(0, 8) + "***"; }

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Apply token masking to the log statement when a new token is created.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: logger.debug("...", ssoName, maskToken(savedResponse.getCurrentResponse().getAccessToken()));

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Apply token masking to the log statement when using a cached token.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: logger.debug("...", ssoName, ..., maskToken(savedResponse.getCurrentResponse().getAccessToken()));

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Apply token masking to the log statement when sending a new token.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: logger.debug("Sent New Token: [{}]", maskToken(response.getAccessToken()));

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Cache the HttpAdapterServletResponse instance to avoid recreating it on every call to res().
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Added private HttpAdapterServletResponse cachedResponse field and lazy initialization in res() method.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Add imports for Brave tracing components and Jakarta Servlet API to support distributed tracing and HTTP context extraction.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: import brave.Span; import brave.Tracing; import brave.propagation.TraceContext; import jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Update tracing initialization to retrieve the full Tracing instance and configure B3 propagation extractor for context extraction from HTTP headers.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Tracing tracing = tracerService.getTracingInstance(name); Tracer tracer = tracing.tracer(); TraceContext.Extractor<HttpServletRequest> extractor = tracing.propagation().extractor(HttpServletRequest::getHeader);

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Pass the Tracing instance to TracerWrapper to enable enhanced tracing capabilities.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: TracerWrapper traceWrapper = new TracerWrapper(tracer, tracing);

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Replace simple span creation with a method that extracts incoming B3 context to support distributed tracing continuity.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: SpanWrapper rootSpan = createServerSpan(traceWrapper, tracer, extractor, ctx.req(), ...);

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Enrich the root span with standard HTTP semantic tags (method, URL, path, query, client IP, user agent, content type/length) for better observability.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: rootSpan.tag("http.method", ctx.method().name()); rootSpan.tag("http.url", ctx.fullUrl()); ...

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Add HTTP status code tag and x-trace-id header to the response in the finally block to complete the tracing lifecycle.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: rootSpan.tag("http.status_code", ctx.statusCode()); ctx.header("x-trace-id", traceWrapper.getTraceId());

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Remove redundant HTTP tags from the secured child span since they are now handled at the root span level.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Removed rootSpan.tag("url-context", ...) and rootSpan.tag("http-method", ...) from inside the secured block.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Remove eager body copying from constructor to implement lazy loading of request body.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Removed call to copyBody() in constructor and deleted the copyBody() method.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Increase the byte buffer size for reading the request body to improve I/O performance.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Changed byte[] buffer size from 1024 to 8192 in getBodyAsBytes().

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Refactor the body caching logic to store the result in the instance field before returning.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Assigned byteArrayOutputStream.toByteArray() to this.body and returned this.body directly.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Extract SSL context and trust manager initialization into static final fields to avoid per-request cryptographic overhead.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: private static final SSLContext SHARED_SSL_CONTEXT; static { ... }

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Introduce a shared OkHttp ConnectionPool instance to reuse connections across different HTTP clients.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: private final ConnectionPool sharedConnectionPool; ... new ConnectionPool(...)

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Remove inline SSL context creation from the client builder method to use the new static shared instance.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Removed TrustManager[] trustAllCerts and SSLContext.getInstance from getHttpClientByListenerName

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Wrap debug logging statements in isDebugEnabled checks to prevent string concatenation overhead when logging is disabled.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: if (logger.isDebugEnabled()) { logger.debug(...); }

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Reformat long method chains and header assignments for better readability and consistent indentation.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Reformatted .header("Authorization", ...) block with line breaks

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Replace string concatenation in debug log with placeholder to avoid unnecessary string building.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: logger.debug("Body Size: [{}]", request.getBodyAsBytes().length);

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Wrap debug logging statements in isDebugEnabled check to prevent object creation and string formatting when logging is disabled.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: if (logger.isDebugEnabled()) { ... }

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Remove verbose raw body content logging and separator lines to reduce log noise and potential security exposure.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Removed logger.debug("\n" + new String(request.getBodyAsBytes()));

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Restructure tracing spans to separate setup, processing, and decision logic into distinct child spans for better observability granularity.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Created 'response-setup', 'response-pipe-decision', 'response-headers-copy', and 'response-send-to-client' spans instead of a single flat structure.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Enrich tracing spans with specific metadata tags to improve debugging and monitoring capabilities.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Added tags like 'synth', 'return-pipe', 'has-processors', 'status-code', and 'upstream-headers-count' to respective spans.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Remove per-header span tagging to reduce tracing overhead and potential performance bottlenecks in high-traffic scenarios.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Removed the loop that added a tag for every header in the upstream response, replacing it with a single 'upstream-headers-count' tag.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Ensure tracing spans are always finished by wrapping logic in try-finally blocks, preventing span leaks.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Wrapped setup, decision, and header copying logic in try-finally blocks to guarantee span.finish() is called.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Replace Portuguese comments with structured phase markers to improve code readability and maintainability.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Changed comments like 'Esta é a response que vai para o usuário' to '--- Fase 1: Setup do client response ---'.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Disable verbose debug logging for header copying to improve performance in production environments.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: Commented out the logger.debug call inside the header copying loop.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Replace ConcurrentSkipListMap with ConcurrentHashMap for responseProcessors to improve performance by removing unnecessary ordering overhead.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: new ConcurrentHashMap<>()

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Replace ConcurrentSkipListMap with ConcurrentHashMap for objects map to improve performance by removing unnecessary ordering overhead.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: new ConcurrentHashMap<>()

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Replace new String() with empty string literal to avoid unnecessary object allocation.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: private String body = "";

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Change default value of returnPipe from false to true to enable streaming response by default for performance.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: private Boolean returnPipe = true;

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Increase the initial capacity of the ByteArrayOutputStream to reduce resizing overhead for larger responses.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: new ByteArrayOutputStream(8192)

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Catch Throwable instead of IOException to handle all potential startup failures.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: catch (Throwable ex) { logger.error("Failed To Start System, please check configuration and custom gse folder.", ex); }

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Configure custom Jetty QueuedThreadPool with configurable min/max threads and idle timeout.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.human_impl: QueuedThreadPool threadPool = new QueuedThreadPool(endPoingConfiguration.getJettyMaxThreads(), endPoingConfiguration.getJettyMinThreads(), endPoingConfiguration.getJettyIdleTimeout()); javalinConfig.jetty.threadPool = threadPool;
